titles.title: O, Lord, My Lord, How Lovely Is Your Name

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O, Lord, my Lord How lovely is Your name How I long to give You praise As your presence feel this way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O, Lord, my Lord How lovely is Your name How I long to seek Your face For You alone deserve my praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For You're worthy, worthy Worthy to receive my praise You're worthy, worthy Worthy to receive my praise
